end,function(U,d)local P=p(d)local c=function(c,R)return l(U,{c,R},d,P)end return c end,350436+-350436,{},function(U,d)local P=p(d)local c=function(c,R,e,C,n)return l(U,{c;R,e;C;n},d,P)end return c end return(X(3889213-203090,{}))(P(n))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[d(243986-239969)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
